content: On October 18, 2021, at approximately 2:30 PM, officers responded to a call regarding an assault with a deadly weapon at 926 S Albany St, Los Angeles, CA. Upon arrival, officers spoke with the victim, Mark Thompson, a 42-year-old Caucasian male, who stated that he had been attacked by a Hispanic male. The victim provided a description of the suspect, who was later identified as Jamie Cooper, a 28-year-old Hispanic male. The suspect allegedly approached the victim and, after a brief verbal altercation, struck the victim in the head with a blunt object. The victim sustained a laceration to the forehead and was transported to a nearby hospital for treatment. Officers canvassed the area and located the suspect nearby. The suspect was taken into custody without incident and was positively identified by the victim as his attacker. A witness, Emily Martinez, a 35-year-old Hispanic female, corroborated the victim's account of the incident. Officers collected evidence from the scene and documented the victim's injuries. The suspect was arrested and booked for 245(a)(4) PC - Assault with a deadly weapon.
